TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-pear_aking 2020s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: eniqan kingal seediq alang ini gdema tikuh musa meepah qneepahanna.
S.PHON: eniqan kiŋal seediq alaŋ ini gdema tikuħ musa meepaħ qneepaħanna.
S.FORM: eniqan kingal seediq alang ini gdema tikuh musa meepah qneepahanna.
S.PHON: eniqan kiŋal seediq alaŋ ini gdema tikuħ musa meepaħ qneepaħanna.
S.TRANSL: 有一個部落的人,他非常忙碌於他的耕作.
There was tribe man. He was very busy with his field work.

S.FORM: mhei ka pnhumaanna di ma.
S.PHON: mħei ka pnħumaanna di ma.
S.FORM: mhei ka pnhumaanna di ma.
S.PHON: mħei ka pnħumaanna di ma.
S.TRANSL: 他耕作的樹結果實了.
The tree that he grew had borne fruits.

S.FORM: wa ini gdema musa lmamu uh hei qhunina.
S.PHON: wa ini gdema musa lmamu uħ ħei qħunina.
S.FORM: wa ini gdema musa lmamu uh hei qhunina.
S.PHON: wa ini gdema musa lmamu uħ ħei qħunina.
S.TRANSL: 就忙著去採他的果實.
He was busy picking the fruits.

S.FORM: ani naq so wada paru ka knkawasna musa mdakin qhuni baro sskingal kn kingalunna musa lmamu ka heina qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: ani naq so wada paɾu ka knkawasna musa mdakin qħuni baɾo sskiŋal kn kiŋalunna musa lmamu ka ħeina qħuni kija.
S.FORM: ani naq so wada paru ka knkawasna musa mdakin qhuni baro sskingal kn kingalunna musa lmamu ka heina qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: ani naq so wada paɾu ka knkawasna musa mdakin qħuni baɾo sskiŋal kn kiŋalunna musa lmamu ka ħeina qħuni kija.
S.TRANSL: 雖說他的年紀很大了,他還是爬上樹去,一個一個地採擷他果樹的果實.
Although he was very old, he still climbed onto the tree and picked his fruits one by one.

S.FORM: ma ini naq gdema ka kingal seediq tmulus miric moda ssiyona hiya.
S.PHON: ma ini naq gdema ka kiŋal seediq tmulus miɾiʦ moda ssijona ħija.
S.FORM: ma ini naq gdema ka kingal seediq tmulus miric moda ssiyona hiya.
S.PHON: ma ini naq gdema ka kiŋal seediq tmulus miɾiʦ moda ssijona ħija.
S.TRANSL: 另外一個人也非常忙碌,牽著他的羊經過了那裡.
There was another busy person. He pulled his goat and passed there.

S.FORM: ini uka krkari ini naq pprengo ye mteeyux meepah odadaha ka seediq tn alang kiya.
S.PHON: ini uka kɾkaɾi ini naq ppɾeŋo je mteejux meepaħ odadaħa ka seediq tn alaŋ kija.
S.FORM: ini uka krkari ini naq pprengo ye mteeyux meepah odadaha ka seediq tn alang kiya.
S.PHON: ini uka kɾkaɾi ini naq ppɾeŋo je mteejux meepaħ odadaħa ka seediq tn alaŋ kija.
S.TRANSL: 他們沒有互相交談,因為他們忙著做自己部落裡的工作.
They did not talk to each other because they were busying doing their own work.

S.FORM: ini qbsiyaq do yani wada teru rawa ka lnamuanna qneepahanna hei qhuni ka baki rudan nii.
S.PHON: ini qbsijaq do jani wada teɾu ɾawa ka lnamuanna qneepaħanna ħei qħuni ka baki ɾudan nii.
S.FORM: ini qbsiyaq do yani wada teru rawa ka lnamuanna qneepahanna hei qhuni ka baki rudan nii.
S.PHON: ini qbsijaq do jani wada teɾu ɾawa ka lnamuanna qneepaħanna ħei qħuni ka baki ɾudan nii.
S.TRANSL: 沒多久,這位老人家就完成了三個籃子的採集工作.
This old man finished his job and gathered three baskets of fruits.

S.FORM: gisu ka laqina kndalax sapah puyasan taapa rulu.
S.PHON: gisu ka laqina kndalax sapaħ pujasan taapa ɾulu.
S.FORM: gisu ka laqina kndalax sapah puyasan taapa rulu.
S.PHON: gisu ka laqina kndalax sapaħ pujasan taapa ɾulu.

TRANSL.notes: 他的孩子騎著車從學校回來(放學)了.

S.TRANSL: 他的孩子騎著車從學校回來 了.
His child came back from school by bicycle.

S.FORM: qitaunna teru rawa rawa ka nangalanna hei qhuni bakina rudan.
S.PHON: qitaunna teɾu ɾawa ɾawa ka naŋalanna ħei qħuni bakina ɾudan.
S.FORM: qitaunna teru rawa rawa ka nangalanna hei qhuni bakina rudan.
S.PHON: qitaunna teɾu ɾawa ɾawa ka naŋalanna ħei qħuni bakina ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: 他看到他的爺爺採的三個籃子的果實.
He saw three baskets of fruits that his grandpa gathered.

S.FORM: ma yena sgaalu ka tamana rudan angalanna hii ka kingal a rawa hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: ma jena sgaalu ka tamana ɾudan aŋalanna ħii ka kiŋal a ɾawa ħei qħuni kija.
S.FORM: ma yena sgaalu ka tamana rudan angalanna hii ka kingal a rawa hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: ma jena sgaalu ka tamana ɾudan aŋalanna ħii ka kiŋal a ɾawa ħei qħuni kija.
S.TRANSL: 然後他疼惜他的爺爺, 所以幫忙提了一個籃子的果實.
And out of care, he helped his grandpa to take a basket of fruits.

S.FORM: dmayo tamana rudan ah haqulunna adisunna sapah.
S.PHON: dmajo tamana ɾudan aħ ħaqulunna adisunna sapaħ.
S.FORM: dmayo tamana rudan ah haqulunna adisunna sapah.
S.PHON: dmajo tamana ɾudan aħ ħaqulunna adisunna sapaħ.
S.TRANSL: 他幫忙他的爺爺搬運回家.
He helped his grandpa take the basket home.

S.FORM: ma ini naq kl kela ka tamana rudan gaga lmamu hei qhuni siyo qhuni baro gaga.
S.PHON: ma ini naq kl kela ka tamana ɾudan gaga lmamu ħei qħuni sijo qħuni baɾo gaga.
S.FORM: ma ini naq kl kela ka tamana rudan gaga lmamu hei qhuni siyo qhuni baro gaga.
S.PHON: ma ini naq kl kela ka tamana ɾudan gaga lmamu ħei qħuni sijo qħuni baɾo gaga.
S.TRANSL: 而他的爺爺卻專心一直採著果實,一點都不知道.
And his grandpa concentrated on picking fruits and did not know that.

S.FORM: ma ye mteeyux naq madis raw rawa uh hei qhuni ka uh laqina kiya ma ini naq klkela duri.
S.PHON: ma je mteejux naq madis ɾaw ɾawa uħ ħei qħuni ka uħ laqina kija ma ini naq klkela duɾi.
S.FORM: ma ye mteeyux naq madis raw rawa uh hei qhuni ka uh laqina kiya ma ini naq klkela duri.
S.PHON: ma je mteejux naq madis ɾaw ɾawa uħ ħei qħuni ka uħ laqina kija ma ini naq klkela duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 而那個孩子也急著帶著那一籃的果實,也完全不知道.
And the child rushed to take that basket of fruits, and did not know it at all.

S.FORM: ma wada taapa rulu ka laqina uh uh risona kiya ma.
S.PHON: ma wada taapa ɾulu ka laqina uħ uħ ɾisona kija ma.
S.FORM: ma wada taapa rulu ka laqina uh uh risona kiya ma.
S.PHON: ma wada taapa ɾulu ka laqina uħ uħ ɾisona kija ma.
S.TRANSL: 接著,他孫子騎著車離開.
And then, his grandson rode his bike and left.

S.FORM: sterung a kingal a uh seediq tnalang mtena taapa rulu.
S.PHON: steɾuŋ a kiŋal a uħ seediq tnalaŋ mtena taapa ɾulu.
S.FORM: sterung a kingal a uh seediq tnalang mtena taapa rulu.
S.PHON: steɾuŋ a kiŋal a uħ seediq tnalaŋ mtena taapa ɾulu.
S.TRANSL: 迎面來了一位同村的人,一樣騎著車.

TRANSL.notes: (He) met a person in the same tribe who also rode a bike.

S.TRANSL: met a person in the same tribe who also rode a bike.

S.FORM: ma qmita laqi mqedin ka uh riso kiya ma wada skiya ka bunuhna.
S.PHON: ma qmita laqi mqedin ka uħ ɾiso kija ma wada skija ka bunuħna.
S.FORM: ma qmita laqi mqedin ka uh riso kiya ma wada skiya ka bunuhna.
S.PHON: ma qmita laqi mqedin ka uħ ɾiso kija ma wada skija ka bunuħna.
S.TRANSL: 這個男孩看著一個女孩,然後他的帽子就飛走了.
This boy looked at a girl and then his hat flew away.

S.FORM: ma ye moda tdiyan btunux di ma moda takun tgarang dheran kana ka hei qhuni lnamuna bakina rudan.
S.PHON: ma je moda tdijan btunux di ma moda takun tgaɾaŋ dħeɾan kana ka ħei qħuni lnamuna bakina ɾudan.
S.FORM: ma ye moda tdiyan btunux di ma moda takun tgarang dheran kana ka hei qhuni lnamuna bakina rudan.
S.PHON: ma je moda tdijan btunux di ma moda takun tgaɾaŋ dħeɾan kana ka ħei qħuni lnamuna bakina ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: 也因為碰到了石頭而跌倒,爺爺採的果實也全散落在地.
As he bumped into a stone and fell down, the fruits were scattered on the ground.

S.FORM: ye mnarux ba ka papakna ma mklmingis en s kingal lamuun lamuunna ka hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: je mnaɾux ba ka papakna ma mklmiŋis en s kiŋal lamuun lamuunna ka ħei qħuni kija.
S.FORM: ye mnarux ba ka papakna ma mklmingis en s kingal lamuun lamuunna ka hei qhuni kiya.
S.PHON: je mnaɾux ba ka papakna ma mklmiŋis en s kiŋal lamuun lamuunna ka ħei qħuni kija.
S.TRANSL: 看起來他的腳很痛,也想哭;他一個一個的撿著果實.
His foot seemed to hurt and he felt like crying; he picked up the fruits one by one.

S.FORM: ma moda hiya ka uh tnalang ka lqlaqi duri.
S.PHON: ma moda ħija ka uħ tnalaŋ ka lqlaqi duɾi.
S.FORM: ma moda hiya ka uh tnalang ka lqlaqi duri.
S.PHON: ma moda ħija ka uħ tnalaŋ ka lqlaqi duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 同時部落裡的孩子們也從那裡經過.
At the same time, children in the tribe also passed there.

S.FORM: qmita taqi hiya taqi uh takun ma ye gmaalu heya ma du dayoundaha lmamu ka uh tuting dheran hei qhuni ka seediq tnalang laqi hiya malu ba m ggaalu bale.
S.PHON: qmita taqi ħija taqi uħ takun ma je gmaalu ħeja ma du dajoundaħa lmamu ka uħ tutiŋ dħeɾan ħei qħuni ka seediq tnalaŋ laqi ħija malu ba m ggaalu bale.
S.FORM: qmita taqi hiya taqi uh takun ma ye gmaalu heya ma du dayoundaha lmamu ka uh tuting dheran hei qhuni ka seediq tnalang laqi hiya malu ba m ggaalu bale.
S.PHON: qmita taqi ħija taqi uħ takun ma je gmaalu ħeja ma du dajoundaħa lmamu ka uħ tutiŋ dħeɾan ħei qħuni ka seediq tnalaŋ laqi ħija malu ba m ggaalu bale.
S.TRANSL: 同部落的小孩看到他跌倒,就同情他,幫他撿起地上掉落的果實.這樣互相幫忙真的很好.
Those children in the same tribe saw him fall down. They felt sorry for him and helped him pick up the fruits on the ground. Cooperation is really good.

S.FORM: ma mhedu a lmamu di ma ini taapa rulu tulusunna ka ruluna dahaka hei qhuni laqa laqi nii ma mkesa ma ye mnarux papakna.
S.PHON: ma mħedu a lmamu di ma ini taapa ɾulu tulusunna ka ɾuluna daħaka ħei qħuni laqa laqi nii ma mkesa ma je mnaɾux papakna.
S.FORM: ma mhedu a lmamu di ma ini taapa rulu tulusunna ka ruluna dahaka hei qhuni laqa laqi nii ma mkesa ma ye mnarux papakna.
S.PHON: ma mħedu a lmamu di ma ini taapa ɾulu tulusunna ka ɾuluna daħaka ħei qħuni laqa laqi nii ma mkesa ma je mnaɾux papakna.
S.TRANSL: 撿完果實之後,他牽著車走著,他的腳感覺真的痛而想哭.
After picking all the fruits up, he walked with his bike. He felt like crying because his foot hurt.

S.FORM: mbahang ga lmawa ka uh uh laqi tnalang hiya wisu tmalang hmadus tntinganna ka bunuh ma ye mhuwe bale mesa lngelunganna ma mangal teru hei qhuni asuwunna uh dmnayo heya ka uh laqi nii.
S.PHON: mbaħaŋ ga lmawa ka uħ uħ laqi tnalaŋ ħija wisu tmalaŋ ħmadus tntiŋanna ka bunuħ ma je mħuwe bale mesa lŋeluŋanna ma maŋal teɾu ħei qħuni asuwunna uħ dmnajo ħeja ka uħ laqi nii.
S.FORM: mbahang ga lmawa ka uh uh laqi tnalang hiya wisu tmalang hmadus tntinganna ka bunuh ma ye mhuwe bale mesa lngelunganna ma mangal teru hei qhuni asuwunna uh dmnayo heya ka uh laqi nii.
S.PHON: mbaħaŋ ga lmawa ka uħ uħ laqi tnalaŋ ħija wisu tmalaŋ ħmadus tntiŋanna ka bunuħ ma je mħuwe bale mesa lŋeluŋanna ma maŋal teɾu ħei qħuni asuwunna uħ dmnajo ħeja ka uħ laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 卻聽到同村的孩子喊著他,並送來他掉落的帽子,他感動的拿了三個果實給這些小孩.
But he heard the children from the same tribe calling him, and they gave him his hat. Out of gratitude, he gave these children three fruits.

S.FORM: ma bsiyaq hari do moda moda lamuan a uh hei qhuni hiya ka le la lqlaqi ma.
S.PHON: ma bsijaq ħaɾi do moda moda lamuan a uħ ħei qħuni ħija ka le la lqlaqi ma.
S.FORM: ma bsiyaq hari do moda moda lamuan a uh hei qhuni hiya ka le la lqlaqi ma.
S.PHON: ma bsijaq ħaɾi do moda moda lamuan a uħ ħei qħuni ħija ka le la lqlaqi ma.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後,孩子們經過採集果實處.
Before long, the children passed by the place where the old man gathered the fruits.

S.FORM: qmita rawana ka baki rudan ma wada uka kingal a hei qhuni di ha mesa lmngelung wana sepuun ma wada inu di.
S.PHON: qmita ɾawana ka baki ɾudan ma wada uka kiŋal a ħei qħuni di ħa mesa lmŋeluŋ wana sepuun ma wada inu di.
S.FORM: qmita rawana ka baki rudan ma wada uka kingal a hei qhuni di ha mesa lmngelung wana sepuun ma wada inu di.
S.PHON: qmita ɾawana ka baki ɾudan ma wada uka kiŋal a ħei qħuni di ħa mesa lmŋeluŋ wana sepuun ma wada inu di.
S.TRANSL: 老先生看著他所採的果實「怎麼少了一個呢?」,他這樣想著並數著「去了哪兒呢?」

TRANSL.notes: The old man saw the gathered fruits and thought, "How come there is one (basket) missing?". He counted and thought ""Where has it gone?".

S.TRANSL: The old man saw the gathered fruits and thought, "How come there is one missing?". He counted and thought ""Where has it gone?".

S.FORM: ini naq klkela ka de eh laq lqlaqi moda ssiyona hiya.
S.PHON: ini naq klkela ka de eħ laq lqlaqi moda ssijona ħija.
S.FORM: ini naq klkela ka de eh laq lqlaqi moda ssiyona hiya.
S.PHON: ini naq klkela ka de eħ laq lqlaqi moda ssijona ħija.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子完全不知情的經過那裡.
The children didn't know what happened and passed by.

S.FORM: lmngelung baki rudan wada inu kingalna rawa mnangalna hei qhuni di ha uxe teru peni ye daha bale ma lmngelung bale ba ka bakina rudan nii.
S.PHON: lmŋeluŋ baki ɾudan wada inu kiŋalna ɾawa mnaŋalna ħei qħuni di ħa uxe teɾu peni je daħa bale ma lmŋeluŋ bale ba ka bakina ɾudan nii.
S.FORM: lmngelung baki rudan wada inu kingalna rawa mnangalna hei qhuni di ha uxe teru peni ye daha bale ma lmngelung bale ba ka bakina rudan nii.
S.PHON: lmŋeluŋ baki ɾudan wada inu kiŋalna ɾawa mnaŋalna ħei qħuni di ħa uxe teɾu peni je daħa bale ma lmŋeluŋ bale ba ka bakina ɾudan nii.
S.TRANSL: 老爺爺想著,「我們採的果實一籃去了哪呢?不是三個嗎?還是只有兩個?」他這位爺爺不停的想著.
The old man thought, "Do I not have three baskets of fruits? Where is the missing one ? Is it that in fact I have only two baskets?".
